hero.title: Automotive research and consulting for strategic decision-making.
hero.subtitle: Since 1992, L+H has supported complex research and consulting projects across the automotive industry, from volume clinics and design studies to ethnography, online research, and executive-level insight synthesis. We combine advanced research methodology, senior judgment, flexible execution, and clear, decision-ready reporting. Our work is designed to stand up to expert review, management discussion, and board-level decision-making.

performance.title: Senior expertise. Agile execution. Decisions you can stand behind.
performance.subtitle: We combine methodological precision, lean project management, and management-level results delivery.

cards.title: Direct access to experienced senior consultants
cards.text: No unnecessary handoffs, no loss of context. Your project is led by experienced senior consultants from the start.

cards.title: Flexibility with substance
cards.text: Short communication lines, fast response times, and reliable quality standards.

cards.title: Insights built to hold up
cards.text: Decision-ready insights for experts, cross-functional teams, management, and the board.

customers.title: A trusted partner for automotive manufacturers, suppliers, and decision-makers.
customers.subtitle: We operate where product, brand, and market strategies are shaped by a deep understanding of the customer.

groups.title: Manufacturers & Automotive Brands
groups.text: Research for concepts, vehicle designs, product development, and strategic decision-making.

groups.title: Mobility Companies & Emerging Players
groups.text: Customer and user perspectives for new services, offerings, and market entry decisions.

groups.title: Sales & Retail Networks
groups.text: Research for sales and service experiences that help shape brand success.

customers.logos_caption: Trusted research partner for Porsche, BMW, Bentley, Audi, and MINI.

methods.title: Advanced methods. Critical evaluation. Tailored approaches for every research question.
methods.subtitle: We combine qualitative, quantitative, and hybrid approaches, with a clear focus on actionable insights, practical relevance, and confident decision-making.

items.title: Qualitative research
items.text: Uncovering the underlying motivations, perceptions, and experiences that shape customer decisions.

items.title: Car clinics & product-focused studies (virtual & physical)
items.text: Early feedback on concepts, prototypes, and design directions.

items.title: Consulting & insight integration
items.text: Insights that go beyond reporting and directly support decision-making.

car_clinics.title: Car clinics designed for high-stakes projects and confident product decisions.
car_clinics.paragraph_1: For many years, L+H has been supporting volume car clinics, concept evaluations, and design clinics across complex automotive environments.

cards.title: Volume and static car clinics
cards.text: Structured evaluation of vehicles and competitors, including volume, pricing, and detailed product attributes.

cards.title: Concept and design clinics
cards.text: Early-stage customer feedback on design direction, brand positioning, and perceived product value.

cards.title: Prototype-based execution
cards.text: TISAX-certified, privacy-compliant, and secure research execution for confidential development projects.

cards.title: UX/UI & smart vehicle experience research
cards.text: Customer-based research for the mobility of the future – evaluating digital cockpits, user interfaces, connected functions, and new electric vehicle concepts.

conclusion.title: When research shapes better decisions.
conclusion.paragraph_1: We bring together methodological rigor, TISAX-certified process security, flexible project leadership, and executive-ready insights that support decisions from specialist teams through to senior management and the board.
conclusion.paragraph_2: Through our privacy-compliant AI platform, we continuously evolve research processes, providing more precise analysis, faster synthesis, and reliable decision foundations.
conclusion.cta: Let's discuss how we can support your project.
